schedule.schedule: In this menu, you'll be able to see the schedule of any school day out of the year.
schedule.bell: Each individual bell is set to match the information you provided about your class schedule, and clicking on any bell will display more information about it.
schedule.date: Up top, you'll find the date you're currently viewing. You can use the buttons or simple swiping gestures to flip between days.
schedule.calendar: ... or click this button to quickly navigate through the school days of the year.
schedule.info: Tap this button to view important information about a school day, if available.
schedule.settings: Lastly, if you ever want to edit your class information, you can do so by clicking this button.

schedule_settings.schedule_settings: In this menu, you'll be able to customize your schedule to match the classes you have.
schedule_settings.button: Click on any individual bell to change its name, information, and appearance.
schedule_settings.qr: ... or try sharing your schedules through QR codes!
schedule_settings.complete: Once you're satisfied with your schedule, tap the button down here to move on.

bell_settings.bell_settings: In this menu, you'll be able to customize any individual bell on your schedule.
bell_settings.color_wheel: You can give each bell a distinctive color using the color wheel.
bell_settings.color_row: ...or by selecting one from the available options.
bell_settings.icon: Additionally, you can select an icon to represent each bell.
bell_settings.decal: Try setting the decal background of the bell, too!
bell_settings.info: As well, you can input the information about your class so that you can remember it later.
bell_settings.alternate: ...and if your class changes daily, you can add an alternate class for the bell.
bell_settings.complete: When you've finished customizing the bell, press this button to save your changes and exit.
bell_settings.help: If you ever need help, press this button here.

bell_alt_settings.!bell_settings:bell_settings: In this menu, you'll be able to specify an alternate bell dependent on the day.
bell_alt_settings.day: Down here, you can scroll through all the days this bell appears on and select when to replace the normal settings for this bell.
bell_alt_settings.vanity: Up here, you can customize the alternate bell using the same settings as normal.
bell_alt_settings.alternate: When you're done, tap this button up here to return to the standard bell settings.
bell_alt_settings.help: ...and if you ever need help, press this button here.

april_fools.button: There seems to be an event going on...
